name: Swiss Ham Ring-Around
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Fresh or frozen chopped broccoli, uncooked
1 can Chunk ham (5 oz), drained and separated into chunks
1 can Pillsbury refrigerated quick crescent dinner rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Cook and drain the broccoli.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine margarine, parsley, onion, mustard, and lemon juice; blend well.
4. Add cheese, broccoli, and ham; mix lightly.
5. Set aside.
6. Separate crescent dough into 8 triangles.
7. On a greased cookie sheet, arrange the triangles with points toward the outside in a circle. The center opening should be about 3 inches in diameter (should look like an eight-pointed star).
8. Spoon the ham filling evenly over the bases of the triangles.
9. Fold the points of the triangles over the filling and tuck them under the bases at the center of the circle.
10. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
11. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes, or until golden brown.
12. Serve hot.
Tip: To make ahead, cover and refrigerate up to 3 hours; bake for 30 to 35 minutes.
